title: Fresh Horse Stations
description: Players can spend on fresh horses in the middle of a route to extend the distance they can travel. This allows reaching more distant cities but adds cost. Strategic placement of horse stations extends effective range.
definition-of-done: Fresh horse stations can be placed along routes. Using fresh horses extends travel distance. Cost associated with horse station use. Route planner shows extended range with stations.
testing-plan: Verify horse stations extend travel distance. Test cost calculation for station use. Verify route planner shows extended range.
todos: Build cost calculation for fresh horses
